modules.name: ESP-WROOM-02D

module_variant_details.name: ESP-WROOM-02D
module_variant_details.flash: 2 MB / 4 MB / 16 MB SPI flash ordering options
module_variant_details.pinout_impact: Same 19-pad module pinout as ESP-WROOM-02U; antenna implementation and module length differ.

notes: Package pin name is MTMS; common maker use is GPIO14 or HSPI clock.
Package pin name is MTDI; common maker use is GPIO12 or HSPI MISO.
Package pin name is MTCK; common maker use is GPIO13 or HSPI MOSI.
Module pin table specifies IO15 should be pulled down.
GPIO2, GPIO0, and MTDO are strapping pins used to select boot mode and SDIO mode at reset.
Package pin name is MTDO; common maker use is GPIO15 or HSPI chip select.
Module pin table specifies IO2 should float, use its internal pull-up, or be pulled up for boot.
GPIO2, GPIO0, and MTDO are strapping pins used to select boot mode and SDIO mode at reset.
Used as UART TX during flash programming.
UART download mode requires IO0 pulled down; flash boot requires IO0 floating or pulled up.
GPIO2, GPIO0, and MTDO are strapping pins used to select boot mode and SDIO mode at reset.
UART0 receive pin and receive end during UART download.
UART0 is used for flash programming and boot/debug serial output.
UART0 transmit pin and transmit end during UART download; the module pin table says it may float or be pulled up.
UART0 is used for flash programming and boot/debug serial output.
U0TXD should not be pulled externally low during powering-up.
GPIO16 can be used for deep-sleep wake-up when connected to RST.
Connect XPD_DCDC to EXT_RSTB when GPIO16 is used for deep-sleep wakeup.
GPIO16 can only be configured with an internal pull-down.
